phrases.intent_en: Ask where Leonardo da Vinci's tomb is located
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le tombeau de Léonard de Vinci ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh tom-BOH duh lay-oh-NAR duh VAN-see
phrases.cultural_note: Leonardo da Vinci is buried in the Chapelle Saint-Hubert within the château grounds. He died in 1519 at the nearby Clos Lucé.

responses.english: In the Chapel Saint-Hubert, on the right.
responses.phonetic: dahn lah shah-PEL sant-oo-BEHR, ah DRWAHT
responses.french: Dans la Chapelle Saint-Hubert, à droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the next guided tour time
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence la prochaine visite guidée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR koh-MAHNS lah proh-SHEN vee-ZEET gee-DAY
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours of the château are available in French and English. The terrace offers a panoramic view over the Loire Valley.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a student discount
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un tarif réduit pour les étudiants ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn tah-REEF ray-DWEE poor lay zay-too-DYAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Château d'Amboise offers reduced rates for students under 26 with valid ID, and free entry for children under 7.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide available
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are available in multiple languages and cover the royal apartments, the chapel, and the terrace walk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view from the terrace
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut voir la Loire depuis la terrasse ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh kon PUH vwar lah LWAR duh-PWEE lah teh-RASS
phrases.cultural_note: The terrace of the château provides a sweeping view of the Loire River and the town of Amboise below, considered one of the finest panoramas in the Loire Valley.
